hero.title: Run Your Shop with AI — Now Even Easier
hero.description: No more paper ledger hassle — just speak, and everything is done. Manage sales, expenses, dues and stock by speaking in Bangla. No typing, no hassle — just your voice.
hero.voiceSample: 50 kg rice sold today, 80 taka per kg

features.sectionTitle: All Your Shop Tasks in One Place
features.sectionSubtitle: The most modern technology now in your hands
features.voiceDescription: Just speak in Bangla and AI automatically records everything. No typing needed.
features.dueDescription: Easily track customer dues. Send reminders via WhatsApp.
features.stockDescription: Know which products are running low before they finish. It even tells you when to reorder.
features.reportsDescription: View daily and weekly profit & loss accounts at a glance.
features.securityDescription: All your data is completely safe and secure.
features.aiDescription: Which product sells the most, where the profit is higher — AI will tell you.

pricing.label: Pricing Plans
pricing.title: The Right Plan for Your Business
pricing.subtitle: Get all premium features at affordable prices
pricing.heroTitleAccent: Companion for Every Step of Growth
pricing.heroDescription: A digital ledger that grows with you. From simple tracking to AI-powered insights — everything in one place.
pricing.enterpriseDescription: Customized solutions tailored to your organization's needs. Dedicated manager and on-premise data hosting.
pricing.ft2OfferNote: Exclusive offer for FT1 users — activated via notification only.

t1.quote: I used to sit with ledgers at night. Now I just tell everything at closing time — all accounts are organized. Saves at least 5 hours a month!
t1.name: Abdul Jabbar

t2.quote: Sending WhatsApp reminders to due customers is now very easy. No awkward conversations — the system does it for you.
t2.name: Rahul Ahmed

t3.quote: Even my young shop assistant can use it easily now. Such a simple app — perfect for everyone.
t3.name: Sumaiya Parveen

footer.tagline: Simplifying accounting for Bangladesh's micro-shops with AI

growthStory.title: Journey of Prosperity
growthStory.subtitle: Our ledger will be with you at every step from a small shop to a super shop. See how your business can grow.

stage1.title: From Ledger to Digital
stage1.description: Say goodbye to lost ledgers and accounting confusion! With the magical power of digital ledgers, keep every transaction of your business in front of your eyes, within reach. Start your digital revolution today.

stage2.title: Building Customer Trust
stage2.description: Step forward in professionalism. Build immense trust in your customers' minds through automatic SMS alerts. Transparent transactions and clear accounting are the main keys to your business's lasting success.

stage3.title: Intelligent Decisions
stage3.description: Your data will now tell your future. Our powerful AI will find which products give you the most profit and where waste occurs. Increase your profits manifold by making the right decisions at the right time.

stage4.title: Empire Expansion
stage4.description: Build your business empire from a single shop! Control all your branches from anywhere in the world through multi-store connectivity. Business expansion is now in your hands.

security.title: Bank-Level Security
security.description: All your data is end-to-end encrypted.

backup.title: Live Backup
backup.description: Don't worry if you lose your phone, your data is safe in the cloud.

support.title: 24/7 Customer Support
support.description: Our team is by your side for any problem.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I use it without a computer?
faq.a1: ✅ Yes, you can do everything with just a mobile phone.
faq.a2: ✅ Yes, it can understand various regional accents too.
faq.q3: How many shops can I manage?
faq.a3: ✅ From 1 shop (Free/Basic) up to 7 shops (Plus plan) — all from one account.

finalCta.title: Start Today — 65 Days Completely Free
finalCta.description: No card needed, no hassle. Get started in just 1 minute.

cookies.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site traffic. By continuing, you agree to our use of cookies.

hero.title: Every Shop Deserves Smart Accounting
hero.subtitle: DokaniAI is on a mission to bring AI-powered digital accounting to every micro-shop in Bangladesh — starting from your neighborhood মুদি দোকান.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Bangladesh has over 5 million micro-shops. Most still rely on paper ledgers, mental math, and guesswork. We're changing that — one voice command at a time.
mission.card1Desc: No complex UI. Just speak in Bangla and DokaniAI does the rest — sales, expenses, inventory, due tracking.
mission.card2Desc: Our AI speaks Bangla. Tell it "৫ কেজি চাল বিক্রি ৩০০ টাকা" and watch the magic happen.
mission.card3Desc: Smart insights, profit reports, and inventory alerts help you make better business decisions every day.

problem.title: The Problem We Solve
problem.subtitle: Paper-based accounting is holding back millions of Bangladeshi businesses.
problem.p1Desc: Handwritten ledgers get damaged, lost, or are impossible to search. Critical business data disappears daily.
problem.p2Desc: Mental math and manual calculations lead to pricing mistakes, wrong totals, and lost profits.
problem.p3Desc: Most micro-shops never grow beyond their initial stage. Without understanding business functions — sales trends, profit margins, inventory patterns — shopkeepers can't make smarter decisions to scale up.

solution.title: How DokaniAI Helps
solution.subtitle: Simple, powerful tools designed specifically for Bangladeshi shopkeepers.
solution.s1Desc: Just speak in Bangla — AI understands and records everything automatically.
solution.s2Desc: Track products, get low-stock alerts, and never run out of best-sellers.
solution.s3Desc: Track বাকী (credit sales), send WhatsApp reminders, and get paid faster.
solution.s4Desc: Ask questions about your business in Bangla and get instant, actionable insights.

why.title: Why Choose DokaniAI?
why.w1Desc: Full Bengali language support — not a translated afterthought, but built from the ground up for Bangla speakers.
why.w2Desc: Our AI analyzes your sales patterns, inventory, and expenses to give you actionable business intelligence — helping you make smarter decisions every day.
why.w3Desc: Your business data is encrypted and secure. We never share your information with third parties.
why.w4Desc: Starting at just ৳149/month — less than a cup of tea per day. And the 65-day free trial means zero risk.
why.ctaDesc: Join thousands of Bangladeshi shopkeepers who are already using DokaniAI to grow their business.
why.ctaSubtext: No credit card required • 65 days free • Cancel anytime

cta.title: Your Shop's Digital Journey Starts Here
cta.description: Try DokaniAI free for 65 days. No credit card, no commitment. Just speak and see the magic.

service.desc: DokaniAI is an AI-powered digital accounting system designed for small businesses in Bangladesh. By using our service, you agree to these terms.

acceptance.title: 1.1 Acceptance
acceptance.desc: By creating an account, accessing, or using DokaniAI, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service, our Privacy Policy, and Payment Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

create.title: 2.1 Account Creation
create.p1: Register with a valid phone number from Bangladesh
create.p2: Verify your identity through OTP verification
create.p3: Complete onboarding to set up your first business

deactivate.title: 2.2 Account Deactivation
deactivate.p1: We may deactivate accounts that violate these terms.
deactivate.p2: You will be notified before deactivation with reason.
deactivate.p3: You can appeal within 7 days of deactivation.
deactivate.p4: Deactivated accounts retain data for 30 days before deletion.

delete.title: 2.3 Account Deletion
delete.desc: ⚠️ Account deletion is permanent. All business data, sales history, customer records, and transaction data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

plans.title: 3.1 Plans & Pricing
plans.p1: We offer various subscription plans (Free Trial, Basic, Pro, Plus, Enterprise).
plans.p2: Each plan has specific features, limits, and pricing published on our website.
plans.p3: We reserve the right to change plan pricing or features with 30 days notice.

payment.title: 3.2 Payment
payment.p1: Payments are accepted in Bangladeshi Taka (BDT) through Mobile Financial Services (bKash, Nagad, Rocket).
payment.p2: Payment is verified via Transaction ID (TrxID). Subscription activates within 1-5 minutes of verification.
payment.p3: If payment is not successful, the subscription will not be activated.

refund.title: 3.3 Refund Policy
refund.p1: Free Trial period has no payment, so no refund is applicable.
refund.p2: For paid plans, refund requests can be made within the first 7 days if dissatisfied.
refund.p3: Full refund is not applicable after using the provided services during an active subscription.

cancel.title: 3.4 Subscription Cancellation
cancel.p1: You can cancel your subscription at any time.
cancel.p2: After cancellation, the service will continue until the end of the current billing period.
cancel.p3: No additional charges apply after cancellation.

accuracy.title: 4.1 AI Accuracy
accuracy.p1: AI-generated insights are suggestions only — not financial advice.
accuracy.p2: We do not guarantee 100% accuracy of AI predictions or recommendations.
accuracy.p3: Users should verify AI suggestions before making business decisions.
accuracy.p4: AI accuracy improves over time with more data input.

voice.title: 4.2 Voice Commands
voice.p1: Voice input is processed for command interpretation only.
voice.p2: Voice data is not stored permanently after processing.
voice.p3: Bangla speech recognition accuracy depends on accent and environment.

limits.title: 4.3 AI Usage Limits
limits.p1: Each plan has a daily AI command limit that resets at midnight.
limits.p2: Exceeding limits requires upgrading to a higher plan.
limits.p3: Unused AI commands do not carry over to the next day.

providers.title: 4.4 Third-Party AI Providers
providers.p1: DokaniAI uses third-party AI services for intelligent features.
providers.p2: Your business data is processed by these providers under strict confidentiality.
providers.p3: We do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.
providers.note: AI providers are contractually bound to data protection agreements.

changes.title: 4.5 AI Feature Changes
changes.p1: AI features may be updated, modified, or discontinued with notice.
changes.p2: We strive to improve AI capabilities continuously.
changes.p3: Critical AI feature changes will be communicated 30 days in advance.

training.title: 4.6 AI Training Data
training.p1: Your anonymized data may be used to improve AI models.
training.p2: You can opt out of AI training data usage in Settings.
training.p3: Opting out does not affect core functionality of the service.

usage.title: 5.1 Acceptable Use
usage.p1: Use the service only for lawful business purposes.
usage.p2: Provide accurate business and personal information.
usage.p3: Do not attempt to reverse engineer or exploit the system.
usage.p4: Do not share your account credentials with others.
usage.p5: Report any security vulnerabilities to support@dokaniai.com.

ownership.title: 5.2 Data Ownership
ownership.p1: You retain ownership of all business data you input.
ownership.p2: DokaniAI acts as a data processor on your behalf.
ownership.p3: You can export your data at any time through the app.

dokaniai.title: 6.1 DokaniAI IP
dokaniai.p1: The DokaniAI platform, including software, design, and branding, is our intellectual property.
dokaniai.p2: You may not copy, modify, or distribute any part of the platform without permission.

user.title: 6.2 User Content
user.p1: You grant DokaniAI a limited license to process your data for providing the service.
user.p2: This license terminates when you delete your account and all associated data.

asis.title: 8.1 As-Is Service
asis.p1: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind.
asis.p2: We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service.

limit.title: 8.2 Liability Limitations
limit.p1: DokaniAI is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
limit.p2: Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you in the last 6 months.
limit.p3: We are not responsible for losses due to third-party service failures.
limit.p4: We are not liable for business decisions made based on AI suggestions.
limit.p5: Force majeure events exempt us from liability during the event period.

max.title: 8.3 Maximum Liability
max.p1: Maximum liability is capped at 2x your last subscription payment amount.
max.p2: This cap does not apply to cases of gross negligence or willful misconduct.

serviceChanges.title: 7. Service Changes & Suspension
serviceChanges.changeP1: We may modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service with reasonable notice.
serviceChanges.changeP2: We will make commercially reasonable efforts to notify you of material changes.
serviceChanges.suspendP1: Accounts may be suspended for Terms of Service violations.
serviceChanges.suspendP2: Suspended account holders will be notified with reason and appeal process.
serviceChanges.suspendP3: Data from suspended accounts is retained for 30 days before deletion.

indemnification.title: 9. Indemnification
indemnification.desc: You agree to indemnify DokaniAI against claims arising from:
indemnification.p1: Your violation of these Terms of Service.
indemnification.p2: Your violation of applicable laws or regulations.
indemnification.p3: Infringement of third-party rights through your use of the service.

dispute.title: 10. Dispute Resolution
dispute.p1: Contact us at support@dokaniai.com with your concern.
dispute.p2: Our team will review and propose resolution within 3-5 business days.
dispute.p3: Unresolved disputes will be handled through arbitration in Dhaka, Bangladesh.

general.title: 11. General Provisions
general.p1: These terms are governed by the laws of Bangladesh.
general.p2: If any provision is found unenforceable, the rest remain in effect.
general.p3: Our failure to enforce a right does not constitute a waiver.
general.p4: These terms constitute the entire agreement between you and DokaniAI.

purpose.title: 1.1 Purpose
purpose.desc: This privacy policy describes how DokaniAI ("we", "our") collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal information.

scope.title: 1.2 Applicability
scope.p4: All communications related to our service

user.title: 2.2 User-Provided Information
user.business: Business information: shop name, type, address
user.sales: Sales data: sales records, product names, prices
user.stock: Stock data: product quantities, purchase prices
user.due: Credit data: customer names, phone numbers, credit amounts

voice.title: 2.3 Voice & Audio Data
voice.note: Important: Voice data is only collected when you use voice input.

service.title: 3.1 Service Delivery
service.p2: Storing sales, stock, and credit records
service.p3: Providing AI features (voice to text, smart suggestions)

sharing.title: 4. Data Sharing with AI & Third Parties
sharing.paymentNote: Payment processors have their own privacy policies.
sharing.legalNote: We may be required to share data for legal purposes or court orders.
sharing.noSell: We do not sell your data to advertisers
sharing.noShare: We do not share your personal data with third parties (except as noted above)

storage.title: 5. Data Storage & Location
storage.location: Primary server: Singapore (AWS). Backup: Asia-Pacific region. AI processing: per provider.
storage.deletion: When account is deleted, all data will be permanently removed within 30 days. It may take up to 90 days to delete data from backups.

security.title: 6. Data Security
security.password: Password: hashed with bcrypt or Argon2id
security.breach: In case of a data breach, we will notify you within 72 hours. Information about the type of breach, affected data, and remedial measures will be provided.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.access: Right to access: You can view all your personal data at any time
rights.correction: Right to correction: You can correct your incorrect or incomplete data
rights.deletion: Right to deletion: You can request to delete all your data ("Right to be Forgotten")
rights.portability: Data portability: You can export all your data in JSON or CSV files
rights.stopProcessing: Right to stop processing: You can request to stop processing certain types of data
rights.howTo: To exercise your rights: email privacy@dokaniai.com. Response within 30 days.

aiTraining.title: 8. AI Training & Data
aiTraining.usedTitle: 8.1 Is Your Data Used for AI Training?
aiTraining.usedAnswer: No. Your personal business data (sales, stock, credit, customer info) is not directly used for AI model training.
aiTraining.anonDesc: After removing all personal identifiers, we may use aggregated data for product development:
aiTraining.optDesc: You can request to be excluded from anonymized data sets:

children.title: 10. Children's Privacy
children.p1: Our service is not for individuals under 18 years of age.
children.p2: We do not knowingly collect data from children.
children.p3: If you know that a child is using our service, please notify us.

international.title: 11. International Data Transfer
international.p1: Your data may be processed outside of Bangladesh.
international.p3: AI providers follow their respective policies.

changes.title: 12. Privacy Policy Changes
changes.p1: We may update this policy at any time.
changes.p2: Major changes will be communicated via email.
changes.p3: Continued use of the service after changes means you accept the new policy.
changes.p4: Check the "Last Updated" date at the top of this page to verify recency.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.whatCookiesDesc: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience by remembering your preferences and understanding how you use our service.
cookies.howWeUseDesc: We use cookies to improve your experience on DokaniAI. They help us keep you logged in, remember your language preference, and analyze how our service is being used so we can make it better.
cookies.type_essentialDesc: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable basic functions like page navigation, secure authentication, and session management. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.
cookies.type_analyticsDesc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve our service and user experience.
cookies.type_functionalDesc: These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. They may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our pages.
cookies.manageCookiesDesc: You can control and manage cookies in your browser settings. You can block or delete cookies, but this may affect your experience on our website. Some features may not work properly without cookies.
cookies.contactDesc: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at

system.title: 1.1 Payment System
system.desc: DokaniAI uses Mobile Financial Services (MFS) based payment system. All transactions are processed through bKash, Nagad, and Rocket. We do not collect or store your MFS account credentials.

plans.title: 1.2 Subscription Plans
plans.note1: Free Trial plans are available once per device and phone number.
plans.note2: All paid plans are billed monthly unless stated otherwise.
plans.note3: AI command limits reset daily at 12:00 AM (Bangladesh Time).
plans.note4: Enterprise plan requires custom contract — contact support@dokaniai.com.

important.title: ⚠️ Important Notice
important.desc: DokaniAI never asks for your MFS PIN or password. Payments are verified through transaction IDs (TrxID) only.

step1.title: Select Plan
step1.desc: Choose your desired subscription plan from the pricing page.

step2.title: Enter Phone Number
step2.desc: Enter your MFS account phone number for payment reference.

step3.title: Send Payment
step3.desc: Send the exact amount to the DokaniAI merchant number shown on screen.

step4.title: Enter TrxID
step4.desc: Enter the transaction ID from your MFS payment confirmation.

step5.title: Verification
step5.desc: Our system verifies your payment within 1-5 minutes. Subscription activates automatically.

wrongTrx.title: 2.4 Wrong TrxID Policy
wrongTrx.p1: If you enter a wrong TrxID, you can re-submit within 24 hours.
wrongTrx.p2: Intentional wrong TrxID submission may result in account suspension.
wrongTrx.p3: DokaniAI is not responsible for payments sent to wrong numbers.
wrongTrx.p4: Always verify the merchant number before sending payment.

billing.title: 3. Subscription & Billing
billing.noAutoRenewal: ℹ️ DokaniAI does NOT auto-renew subscriptions. You must manually renew before expiry.

upgrade.title: 3.2 Plan Upgrade
upgrade.p1: Upgrades take effect immediately upon payment verification.
upgrade.p2: You only pay the difference between current and new plan (pro-rata).
upgrade.p3: Unused AI commands from old plan do NOT carry over.
upgrade.p4: New plan limits apply immediately after upgrade.
upgrade.p5: Upgrade request can be made from Settings → Subscription page.

downgrade.title: 3.3 Plan Downgrade
downgrade.p1: Downgrade takes effect at the end of current billing period.
downgrade.p2: No refund for remaining days in current plan.
downgrade.p3: Data exceeding new plan limits will be read-only (not deleted).

accurateInfo.title: 3.4 Accurate Information
accurateInfo.p1: You must provide accurate phone number and business information.
accurateInfo.p2: Incorrect information may delay payment verification.
accurateInfo.p3: DokaniAI reserves the right to verify provided information.

causes.title: 4.1 Common Failure Causes
causes.p4: Transaction ID already used for a previous payment.
causes.p5: Payment amount does not match subscription fee.

grace.desc: Full access continues. Notification sent to renew subscription.

limited.desc: AI commands disabled. Data visible but read-only. Sales entry still available.

archived.desc: All data archived. Dashboard shows renewal prompt only.

deleted.desc: All business data permanently deleted. Account reset to Free Trial.

repay.title: 4.3 Repayment
repay.p1: You can repay anytime during grace or limited period.
repay.p2: After archival, contact support to restore data before deletion.
repay.p3: Deleted data cannot be recovered under any circumstances.

provision.title: 5.1 Invoice Provision
provision.p1: Digital invoices are generated automatically for every payment.
provision.p2: Invoices are available in Settings → Billing History.
provision.p3: You can download invoices as PDF.

tax.title: 5.3 Tax Information
tax.p2: DokaniAI is registered under Bangladesh tax laws.
tax.p3: Tax invoices available upon request for business accounting.

refund.techIssueCondition: Proven technical bug preventing core feature use

ne.freeTrialReason: No payment was made during free trial
ne.promoCouponReason: Discounted or promotional payments are non-refundable

howTo.title: 7.1 How to Request Refund
howTo.desc: To request a refund, contact us through any of these channels:
howTo.r5: MFS account number for refund transfer

processing.title: 7.2 Refund Processing Timeline
processing.desc: Our refund process follows these stages:

status.title: 7.3 Refund Status Tracking
status.p1: You will receive SMS notification at each stage.
status.p2: Refund status available in Settings → Billing → Refund History.
status.p3: For disputes, contact support with your refund ticket number.

prorata.title: 8. Pro-Rata Calculation
prorata.example: Example: Pro plan (৳399) used for 10 days → Refund = (399 ÷ 30) × 20 = ৳266

idempotency.title: 9.2 Payment Idempotency
idempotency.p1: Each TrxID can only be used once for payment verification.
idempotency.p3: If accidentally charged twice, contact support immediately.

platformClose.title: 10.1 Platform Closure
platformClose.p1: Users will receive 30 days notice before any platform closure.
platformClose.p2: Pro-rata refunds will be processed for all active subscriptions.
platformClose.p3: Data export will be available for 60 days after closure.

forceMajeure.title: 10.2 Force Majeure
forceMajeure.p1: DokaniAI is not liable for service disruption due to natural disasters.
forceMajeure.p3: Internet infrastructure failures beyond our control.

deactivation.title: 10.3 Account Deactivation
deactivation.p1: Accounts deactivated for ToS violation are not eligible for refund.
deactivation.p2: Users will be notified with reason before deactivation.
deactivation.p3: Appeal process available within 7 days of deactivation.

rules.title: 11.2 Free Trial Rules
rules.p1: Free trial is available once per device and phone number.
rules.p2: Phase 2 activates automatically after Phase 1 expires.
rules.p3: You can upgrade to a paid plan anytime during the free trial.
rules.p4: Free trial data carries over when upgrading.
rules.p5: AI commands are limited to 5 per day during free trial.
rules.p6: No payment information required for free trial activation.
rules.p7: Free trial users have access to core features only.

conditions.title: 12.1 Coupon Conditions
conditions.p1: Coupons have an expiration date and cannot be used after.
conditions.p3: Coupons cannot be combined with other offers.
conditions.p4: DokaniAI reserves the right to revoke coupons at any time.

cancellation.title: 12.2 Coupon Cancellation
cancellation.p1: DokaniAI may cancel promotional offers with 7 days notice.
cancellation.p2: Already applied coupons will remain valid until expiry.

credits.title: 13.1 Referral Credits
credits.p1: Both referrer and referee receive bonus credits.
credits.p2: Credits are applied to the next subscription payment.
credits.p3: Referral bonus amount may vary based on promotions.

abuse.title: 13.2 Referral Abuse
abuse.p2: Referral credits from fraudulent accounts will be reversed.
abuse.p3: Excessive abuse may result in account suspension.

safe.title: Keep Your Payments Safe
safe.p1: Only pay through the DokaniAI app or official website.
safe.p2: Never share your MFS PIN with anyone.
safe.p3: Always verify the merchant number before sending payment.
safe.p4: Save your TrxID as proof of payment.

official.title: Official Channels Only
official.p1: DokaniAI will never ask for payment through personal numbers.
official.p2: All official merchant numbers are shown in the app.
official.p3: Report suspicious payment requests to support@dokaniai.com.
official.p4: Follow our social media for payment-related announcements.

responsibilities.title: 15. User Payment Responsibilities
responsibilities.p1: Ensure sufficient balance before initiating payment.
responsibilities.p2: Double-check the payment amount and merchant number.
responsibilities.p3: Keep your TrxID safe for future reference.
responsibilities.p5: Do not share your account with others to avoid payment conflicts.
responsibilities.p6: Renew subscription before expiry to avoid service interruption.

step1.title: Contact Support
step1.desc: Email support@dokaniai.com with your concern and evidence.

step2.title: Investigation
step2.desc: Our team reviews your case within 1-2 business days.

step3.title: Resolution Proposal
step3.desc: We propose a fair resolution based on evidence.

step4.title: Acceptance
step4.desc: Both parties agree on the resolution.

step5.title: Implementation
step5.desc: Resolution is implemented within 3-5 business days.

legal.title: 17. Legal Framework
legal.governed: This payment policy is governed by the laws of Bangladesh.
legal.disputeDhaka: All disputes shall be resolved in Dhaka, Bangladesh.
legal.disputeArbitration: Arbitration will be conducted as per Bangladesh Arbitration Act, 2001.

verification.trxMatchVal: Transaction ID must exist in MFS records
verification.timeWindowVal: TrxID must be within 30 minutes of submission
verification.mfsMatchVal: MFS provider must match selected payment method

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.p1: DokaniAI is an AI-powered business management platform designed for micro and small shopkeepers in Bangladesh. We use artificial intelligence to make your business operations faster, easier, and smarter.
intro.p2: This policy explains how our AI features work, what data they process, and how we protect your information. Your trust is our top priority.

features.title: AI Features We Offer
features.voice: Voice Command Processing — Speak in Bangla to record sales, expenses, and due transactions
features.text: Natural Language Commands — Type commands in everyday Bangla like "আজকের বিক্রয় কত?"
features.chatbot: AI Chatbot — Ask business questions and get instant answers based on your data
features.insights: Business Insights — AI-generated analysis of your sales trends, expenses, and inventory
features.suggestions: Smart Suggestions — Product recommendations and restock alerts during data entry

howItWorks.title: 2. How Our AI Works
howItWorks.p1: DokaniAI uses a privacy-first approach. This means AI models never have direct access to your database.

rag.title: What is the Privacy-First Approach?
rag.desc: Our privacy-first approach retrieves only the specific data needed for your question, provides it as temporary context to the AI, and the context is deleted after the response is generated.
rag.b1: AI never connects directly to your database
rag.b2: Only minimum necessary data is retrieved per query
rag.b3: AI context is deleted after processing — no permanent storage
rag.b4: AI cannot independently access or query your data

sees.title: What Data AI Processes
sees.p1: Your text/voice command (e.g., "চাল ২০ কেজি বিক্রি ১২০০ টাকায়")
sees.p4: Recent conversation context for chat continuity

neverSees.title: What AI Never Sees
neverSees.p1: Passwords, OTPs, and session tokens — never leave our encrypted server
neverSees.p2: Payment data — bKash/Nagad account details and transaction PINs
neverSees.p3: Complete inventory, full customer database, or all transaction history
neverSees.p4: Personal information — phone numbers, email, physical addresses, national ID
neverSees.p5: Voice recordings — deleted immediately after text transcription

providers.title: 4. AI Service Providers
providers.desc: We partner with enterprise-grade AI providers that meet strict security and privacy standards:

zai.purpose: Primary AI — NLP parsing, chatbot, business insights

gemini.purpose: Backup AI — Used only when primary is unavailable
gemini.retention: Per Google Cloud policy, not used for training

providers.noShare: We do NOT share your data with advertisers, data brokers, social media platforms, or any other third party.

training.title: Does AI train on my data?
training.desc: Our agreements with Z.ai and Google Gemini explicitly prohibit training AI models on your data. Your business data remains yours alone.

fairness.title: Fairness & Non-Discrimination
fairness.p1: Our AI is designed to treat all users equally regardless of business size, location, or background
fairness.p2: AI insights are based solely on your own business data — no cross-user data comparison
fairness.p3: We regularly review AI outputs for bias, errors, or unfair patterns

accuracy.title: Accuracy & Limitations
accuracy.p2: AI responses may occasionally be inaccurate — always verify important financial decisions
accuracy.p3: AI insights are suggestions, not guaranteed financial advice
accuracy.p4: You are responsible for reviewing and confirming all AI-suggested actions before they are saved

rights.title: 7. Your AI Rights & Controls
rights.p1: Opt-out — Disable all AI features from Settings → AI → Disable AI Features
rights.p2: Data access — View all your data from Settings → Data → View My Data
rights.p3: Data export — Download your data in CSV/JSON format
rights.p4: Data deletion — Delete your account and all associated data
rights.p5: AI transparency — See which actions were AI-assisted in your activity log

generated.title: 8. AI-Generated Content
generated.p1: Business insights, suggestions, and analysis generated by AI are informational only
generated.p2: DokaniAI is not liable for financial decisions made based on AI-generated insights
generated.p3: AI-generated content does not constitute professional financial, tax, or legal advice

children.title: 9. Children's Safety
children.desc: DokaniAI's AI features are designed for adults running businesses. The platform is not intended for use by children under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.

changes.title: 10. Policy Changes
changes.p1: We will notify you via email 7 days before any significant policy change
changes.p2: An in-app banner notification will be shown for important updates
changes.p3: The 'Last Updated' date on this page will always reflect the latest version

related.title: Related Policies
related.privacy: How we collect, use, and protect your data
related.terms: Terms of service, account management, and liability
related.payment: Subscription plans, billing, and refund policy
related.cookies: How we use cookies and tracking technologies

q1.q: Does AI store my personal data permanently?
q1.a: No. AI providers automatically delete your data within 30 days. Voice recordings are deleted immediately after transcription. No personal data is stored permanently by any AI system.

q2.q: Can AI access my full customer list or inventory?
q2.a: No. AI only receives the minimum data needed to answer your specific question. For example, asking "করিমের বাকী কত?" only retrieves Karim's current due amount — not the entire customer list.

q3.q: Is my data used to train AI models?
q3.a: Absolutely not. Our contracts with all AI providers explicitly prohibit using your data for model training. This is a binding legal commitment.

q4.q: What happens to my voice recordings?
q4.a: Voice recordings are converted to text in real-time and the audio file is immediately deleted. No voice recording is ever stored in any database or sent to any third party.

q5.q: Can I use DokaniAI without AI features?
q5.a: Yes. You can disable AI features from Settings → AI → Disable AI Features. The platform will still work for manual data entry, though some smart features will be unavailable.

q6.q: Is my data safe during the free trial?
q6.a: Yes. Free trial and paid plans follow the exact same security standards. Your data is equally protected regardless of your subscription plan.
